title: broken textures
body:
Do you want to play minecraft with "broken" textures ?
well if you do your in the right place.
use this pack if you want to get the pink and magenta error texture on every block.

Example:


![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/446e2059cb8f7f0d01e2b8c363c7948da38f4c3b.png)
